title: Water Doodle Mat - 120 x 90cm Large Aqua Magic Water Drawing Mat with Magic Pens, Stamps, Molds No Mess Coloring Painting Educational Christmas Birthday Gift for Toddlers Boys Girls Toys Aged 3 4 5
seller_info_text: MATHEUS JUAN DE OLIVEIRA TRADING LIMITED
features: Rich Magic Water Drawing Accessories Boost Kids Creativity & Imagination. This toddler toy comes with 1 magic painting mat, 4 magic pens, 5 stencils, 8 foam shapes, 6 cool stamps, 1 water dish. With various accessories, water doodle mat enriches the imagination of children and stimulates their creativity in unlimited painting.

Larger Drawing Mat Let Families and Friends Draw Together. Water drawing mat measures 47*35 inch, the doodle art area 32.7*20.5 inch. Super large size magic doodle mat enables your kids get parents and their friends (can hold 4 kids draw together) sitting around to share their ideas and love by drawing pictures together!

Premium Material for Kid-safe & Durability. This water painting mat is made of high quality polyester and nylon material. The front uses a soft warp knitted rain-coat fabric, the back of the mat is waterproof nylon material, with this you can always keep your walls and floors clean and stain free. It take little space, portable to carry, suitable for outdoor or Nursery school.

Vivid Color Alphabet Patterns Keep Toddlers Entertained for Hours. This aqua magic doodle mat comes with 8 stencils and a painting book. And there are colourful cartoon animals printed around the aqua mat. Toddlers can learn by tracing and drawing with animals, alphabets, numbers, shapes templates and a drawing booklet included, which can enhance their hands power, develop their hand-eye coordination and color cognition. Making a great play and learning time.

Enjoy the Mess Free Magical Painting Fun with Your Toddler Girls and Boys. The water magic colouring mat comes with more than 20 kinds of accessories. All aqua magic doodle accessories had passed the rigorous testing and certification process before landing at your door. It is a new design to instead of traditional painting tool, saves much papers and avoids any messy. Perfect educational toy gift for children 3 4 5 6 year old!
description: Product Description Water Doodle Mat - Exercise Hand-Eye Coordination and Colour Perception Ability Play, Create, Grow! Toys that spark kids’ joyful education journey! Come and choose a Christmas present for girls and boys! Specifications for Aqua Drawing Mat Whole Size: 120 cm x 90 cm /47 x 35 in Drawing Area Size: 83 cm x 52 cm /33 x 25 in Thickness: 0.5 inch Weight: 550 g Material: Durable soft Polyester Features: Educational toy and Christmas presents for toddlers age 3, 4, 5, 6
